lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੇ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ਲਖਣੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਆਖਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa ke roop na jaahee lakhane kiaa kar aakh veechaaree |2|
lines.english: His beauteous forms cannot be comprehended; what can anyone accomplish by discussing and debating? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਜੁਗ ਹੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚਾਰੇ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: teen gunaa tere jug hee antar chaare tereea khaanee |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, You are the three qualities, and the four sources of creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਥੇ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karam hovai taa param pad paaeeai kathe akath kahaanee |3|
lines.english: If You show Your Mercy, then one obtains the supreme status, and speaks the Unspoken Speech. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: toon karataa keea sabh teraa kiaa ko kare paraanee |
lines.english: You are the Creator; all are created by You. What can any mortal being do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਅਪਣੀ ਸਾਈ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jaa kau nadar kareh toon apanee saaee sach samaanee |4|
lines.english: He alone, upon whom You shower Your Grace, is absorbed into the Truth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਲੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਜੇਤੀ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam teraa sabh koee let hai jetee aavan jaanee |
lines.english: Everyone who comes and goes chants Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਹੋਰ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਇਆਣੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai taa guramukh boojhai hor manamukh firai eaanee |5|
lines.english: When it is pleasing to Your Will, then the Gurmukh understands. Otherwise, the self-willed manmukhs wander in ignorance. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਵੇਦ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਕਉ ਦੀਏ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: chaare ved brahame kau dee parr parr kare veechaaree |
lines.english: You gave the four Vedas to Brahma, for him to read and read continually, and reflect upon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਬਪੁੜਾ ਨਰਕਿ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਅਵਤਾਰੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: taa kaa hukam na boojhai bapurraa narak surag avataaree |6|
lines.english: The wretched one does not understand His Command, and is reincarnated into heaven and hell. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਹ ਜੁਗਹ ਕੇ ਰਾਜੇ ਕੀਏ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਅਵਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jugah jugah ke raaje kee gaaveh kar avataaree |
lines.english: In each and every age, He creates the kings, who are sung of as His Incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਭੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਆਖਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tin bhee ant na paaeaa taa kaa kiaa kar aakh veechaaree |7|
lines.english: Even they have not found His limits; what can I speak of and contemplate? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਸਾਚੁ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: toon sachaa teraa keea sabh saachaa dehi ta saach vakhaanee |
lines.english: You are True, and all that You do is True. If You bless me with the Truth, I will speak on it.
Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਸਚੁ ਬੁਝਾਵਹਿ ਅਪਣਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੮॥੧॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kau sach bujhaaveh apanaa sahaje naam samaanee |8|1|23|
lines.english: One whom You inspire to understand the Truth, is easily absorbed into the Naam. ||8||1||23||
Focusing on the Word of the Shabad, I have obtained lasting peace. ||1||
He has enshrined the Immaculate Name of the Lord within my mind.
The True Guru has dispelled my doubts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: devan vaalaa sabh bidh jaanai guramukh paaeeai naam nidhaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Great Giver knows our condition completely; the Gurmukh obtains the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Listen, O my mind, to the essence of spiritual wisdom.
imbued with peace and poise, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||
The great glory of meeting the True Guru is
that it has quenched the fire of possessiveness and desire;

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: vin gur poore koe na jaanee |
lines.english: Without the Perfect Guru, no one knows the Lord.
The Gurmukh receives the Naam, and the Bani of the Lord's Word. ||3||
Attached to Maya, they are engrossed in duality.
Then, at the Gate of the True Lord, one appears truthful. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤਪਾਂ ਸਿਰਿ ਤਪੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa tapaan sir tap saar |
lines.english: Service to the Guru is the most excellent and sublime penance of penances.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਭ ਦੂਖ ਵਿਸਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo man vasai sabh dookh visaaranahaar |
lines.english: The Dear Lord dwells in the mind, and all suffering departs.
Through the True Word of His Bani, we enter the Mansion of His Presence. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te tribhavan sojhee hoe |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, one comes to know the three worlds.
Understanding his own self, he obtains the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te sabh kul udhaare |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, all of one's generations are saved.
In the Court of the True Lord, you shall be adorned with True Glory. ||6||
Keep the Immaculate Naam enshrined within your heart.
Through the Naam, all of one's generations are saved. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se vaddabhaagee ji gur sevaa laae |
lines.english: How very fortunate are they, who are committed to the Guru's service.
Night and day, they are engaged in devotional worship; the True Name is implanted within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖਹੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam rakhahu ur dhaar |
lines.english: Keep the Name of the Lord enshrined within your heart.
Nanak chants the true thought.
Imbued with devotion to the Lord, the gate of salvation is found. ||8||2||24||
Understanding His Command, one becomes free of desire.
Aasaa, Third Mehl:
Everyone lives, hoping in hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਆ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur naam bujhaaeaa vin naavai bhukh na jaaee |
lines.english: The True Guru has led me to understand the Naam, the Name of the Lord; without the Naam, hunger does not go away.
He alone wakes up, whom the Lord awakens. ||1||
So many are asleep in hope.
